title: aster alpinus subsp. cylleneus
intro: Aster alpinus subsp. cylleneus is a subspecies of the alpine aster plant, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Aster alpinus subsp. cylleneus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
